description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to any branch. Use a matrix strategy to test with Python 3.7, 3.8, 3.9, 3.10, and 3.11 on an ubuntu-latest environment. For each Python version, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, cache the Python environment based on setup.py, test-requirements.txt, and requirements.txt, install requirements with pip, and run tests with pytest while covering the toggl module and using the TOGGL_API_TOKEN from secrets.
